html:
The Spear is a Melee Weapon found in the Weapons Filter. It requires 1 Flint, 1 Rope, and 2 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

The Spear's Durability allows for 150 hits, meaning each hit will reduce it by 0.66%.

Usage

×2

×2

×5

×2

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Nordic Spear skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
  • The Woven - Elegant Pith Pike and Spiral Spear skins were introduced during the official The Forge event in 2018.
Woven - Distinguished
Refined Spear
A rudimentary weapon, sharp and ready for a quarrel.
See ingame
Woven - Distinguished
Weathered Spear
This spear has seen more than its fair share of battles.
Woven - Elegant

See ingame

Forge Collection
Spiral Spear
Keep the drill pointed toward your foes and you'll be triumphant.
See ingame
Elegant
Bumble Spear
It doesn't hit harder than a regular spear, although it certainly still stings.
See ingame
Elegant
Rose Collection
Rose Pike
No sharper than any other spear, though much lovelier.
Loyal
Barbed Pike
Poke'em with the prickly end!

Trivia

  • The Spear was added in the (unnamed) October 2nd, 2012 update.
  • In the old research system, the Spear used to cost 100 Science Points to craft and had a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine.
  • An unused spear attack animation called "spearjab" would have been used for the Spear instead of the normal attack animation, if it were not removed. This animation is used by the Fencing Sword that was added later.

“That's one pointy stick.”
–Wilson
“That looks good for jabbin'!”
–Willow
“It gave me a sliver.”
–Wolfgang
“They who wield it shall become the destroyer of worlds.”
–Wendy
“BRING IT, FLESHLINGS”
–WX-78
“Ancient weapons technology.”
–Wickerbottom
“It lacks the heft of a good solid axe.”
–Woodie
“It's a spear. Yup.”
–Maxwell
“That is nöt my favöred spear, but it will dö the trick.”
–Wigfrid
“We should stick things with the pointy part.”
–Webber
“For kebab-ing.”
–Warly
“Sharp stick”
–Wormwood
“So crude.”
–Winona
“For defense only, I promise.”
–Wortox
“Stabby stick!”
–Wurt
“It has a point... heh...”
–Walter
“Don't think I won't use it if I have to!”
–Wanda
The Spear is a Melee Weapon found in the Weapons Filter. It requires 1 Flint, 1 Rope, and 2 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.
The Spear's Durability allows for 150 hits, meaning each hit will reduce it by 0.66%.

The Woven - Elegant Pith Pike and Spiral Spear skins were introduced during the official The Forge event in 2018.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Spear was added in the (unnamed) October 2nd, 2012 update.
In the old research system, the Spear used to cost 100 Science Points to craft and had a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine.
An unused spear attack animation called "spearjab" would have been used for the Spear instead of the normal attack animation, if it were not removed. This animation is used by the Fencing Sword that was added later.
